summary: Backend testing of BaZi & I Ching API. 15/21 tests passed (71%). Auth (signup/login/me/logout/invalid-token), birth profile CRUD + free-user 1-profile gate, free-user 1-reading gate, stripe checkout creation all work correctly. Reading generation works (verified via DB: 1st reading produced valid 10.7KB markdown with all required '## ' section headers) but failed in this run due to upstream Emergent LLM gateway returning 502 BadGateway intermittently. Stripe poll-session endpoint has a real integration bug: GET returns Stripe 404 'No such checkout.session' for sessions just created via the Emergent proxy.

critical.issue: Returns 400 with Stripe error 'No such checkout.session: cs_test_...'. POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session creates session via Emergent proxy (integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe) and returns session_id+url successfully, but the immediate GET via stripe_checkout.get_checkout_status(session_id) calls Stripe and gets 404. Likely cause: the Emergent stripe proxy creates sessions in its own Stripe account but get_checkout_status() in emergentintegrations is querying the merchant's empty Stripe account (or vice versa). Reproducible 100%. Backend logs show: POST .../checkout/sessions -> 200, GET .../checkout/sessions/{id} -> 404 within ~150ms.

Intermittent 500 because emergentintegrations LlmChat -> litellm raises BadGatewayError 502 from upstream Anthropic via Emergent proxy. NOT a code bug — first reading in earlier run succeeded and produced fully formatted output (10794 chars) containing all required headers: Overall Energetic Profile, Five Elements, I Ching Guidance, Disclaimer, Strengths, Growth Challenges. Recommend adding retry-with-backoff (1-2 retries) around chat.send_message() to mitigate flaky upstream 502s.

minor.issue: Only deletes session_token rows; JWTs remain valid until natural expiry (14 days). Acceptable for MVP but document behavior; consider a JWT denylist or shorter exp for true logout.

action_items: Fix Stripe poll-session integration: investigate why get_checkout_status returns 404 for sessions created seconds earlier via the same Emergent proxy. May require passing a proxy/base_url to the GET path, or using stripe_checkout instance state. Test with Emergent stripe proxy team if SDK bug.

Add retry/backoff around LlmChat.send_message in /api/readings/generate/{profile_id} to absorb transient 502s from the LLM proxy (e.g., 2 retries with 2s/5s sleep). Currently any upstream blip surfaces as a 500 to the user and consumes no free quota (good) but UX is poor.
Consider returning 503 instead of 500 when the LLM upstream is unavailable, so the frontend can show a 'try again' message.
Optional: JWT-based logout currently leaves token usable — add a denylist collection or shorter exp if true logout is required.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 506 lines — borderline; could split auth/profiles/readings/stripe into separate routers if it grows.
/api/auth/logout silently no-ops for JWTs (only removes session_token rows). Document or denylist.

stripe_checkout is instantiated at import time with STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_emergent. Verify emergentintegrations StripeCheckout uses the Emergent proxy base URL for BOTH create and get_checkout_status — current 404 suggests asymmetric routing.

Reading generation has no timeout on LlmChat.send_message; a slow LLM could hold the Kubernetes ingress past its timeout (saw a 502 surfaced at gateway during 3min run). Consider explicit asyncio.wait_for with ~60s.
Good: MongoDB _id excluded everywhere via {'_id':0}; UUID-based ids used; bcrypt password hashing; indexes created on startup.

success_rate.backend: 71% (15/21) — would be 100% absent upstream Emergent LLM 502 and the Stripe poll-session proxy bug

seed_data_creation: Each run creates fresh TEST_signup_{uuid}@bazi.app users; cleanup test deletes their birth profile (cascades readings). Seed users test@bazi.app and stripe@bazi.app left intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_bazi_backend.py. Note that test_generate_reading_for_fresh_user is sensitive to Emergent LLM proxy 502s — retry the run if it fails. test_stripe_poll_session WILL fail until main agent fixes the Stripe GET proxy issue. The first reading produced before the LLM gateway started 502'ing had all required '## ' headers (verified directly from MongoDB). Use BASE_URL https://destiny-chart-7.preview.emergentagent.com/api.
rca_of_issue: 1) Stripe poll 404 RCA: POST creates session in Emergent stripe-proxy account (returns 200 with cs_test_... id), but stripe_checkout.get_checkout_status(session_id) appears to hit Stripe API in a different account/mode where that session does not exist (resource_missing). The two calls must be routed identically. 2) Reading 500 RCA: emergentintegrations.llm.chat -> litellm.completion -> Anthropic via Emergent LLM proxy returned HTTP 502 BadGateway upstream; the backend correctly catches and surfaces as 500. Transient; first call of the testing session succeeded fully. Mitigation: add retry around send_message and consider returning 503 for upstream gateway errors.
